name: cmux-fleet
description: Native cmux parent/child agent orchestration. An input-safe child-completion notify flow (awareness + drain hooks + a fleet-wide router daemon + a passive/autodrain/auto mode dial), surfaceId-keyed identity, peer-to-peer messaging, and a conductor skill for launching, placing, and driving child agents on cmux primitives. USE WHEN: cmux conductor, launch child agent, fleet orchestration, notify flow, sub-agent dispatch on cmux.
